site.name: Sina Nadali
site.description: Digital Product Designer focused on crafting intuitive, high-performing experiences for startups and ambitious brands.

hero.headline: Designing digital products that people love to use.
hero.subtext: Digital Product Designer focused on crafting intuitive, high-performing experiences for startups and ambitious brands.

projectsSection.heading: Recent projects
projectsSection.intro: A focused selection of product design explorations - full case studies are on the way.

projects.title: YouTube Analytics Redesign
projects.description: A focused redesign exploration for improving creator analytics clarity, hierarchy, and decision-making.

projects.title: Mobile Banking Experience
projects.description: A clean mobile banking concept focused on trust, speed, and everyday financial actions.

servicesSection.heading: What I do
servicesSection.intro: Design support across the full product lifecycle - from early structure to polished, shippable interfaces.

services.title: Product Design
services.description: End-to-end design from first concept to a considered, shippable product.

services.title: UX Design
services.description: Research-informed flows and structure that make complex tasks feel effortless.

services.title: UI Design
services.description: Precise, accessible interfaces with clear hierarchy and intentional detail.

services.title: Design Systems
services.description: Scalable component libraries and tokens that keep teams consistent and fast.

services.title: Web Design
services.description: Responsive marketing and product sites built for clarity and performance.

services.title: Mobile Apps
services.description: Native-feeling iOS and Android experiences designed for everyday use.

services.title: Prototyping
services.description: Interactive prototypes that test and validate ideas before engineering invests.

aboutSection.heading: Designing with clarity, purpose, and precision.
aboutSection.intro: I design digital products with a focus on clarity, usability, and polished execution. My work sits between product thinking, user experience, and visual craft - helping ideas become interfaces that feel simple, useful, and considered.

principles.title: Think in systems
principles.description: I create scalable structures, not isolated screens.

principles.title: Design for decisions
principles.description: Every layout, flow, and interaction should help users move with confidence.

principles.title: Polish with restraint
principles.description: Details should make the experience feel better, not louder.

contactSection.heading: Let's build something thoughtful.
contactSection.intro: Have a product idea, redesign, or digital experience in mind? I'm open to collaborations with startups, founders, and ambitious teams.
